title: Glass Hotbar
description: This resource pack changes the hotbar background to glass.
body:
# **🧊 Glass Hotbar**

### **This resource pack changes the hotbar background to glass.**
![Version 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e75282bb158f8920bc02be2656dac6c854eb2262.png)

**It is a great resource pack for those who like simple and compact design.**

## 🎨 Other Variations
_**You can access these variations by clicking on the photos or on my profile.**_

### Connected
[![Version 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19aa26c76e7abec91ff2d588038f185b5898e330.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glass-hotbar-connected)

### Clean
[![Version 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8d6577b00f65e223e7b3b5392efab69868548652.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/glass-hotbar-clean)

## 📦 Installation

1. Download the resource pack .zip file.
2. Place it in your Minecraft resourcepacks folder.
3. Launch Minecraft and go to Options > Resource Packs.
4. Select the pack from the left list and click the arrow to move it to the right (enabled) list.
5. Click "Done" to apply the pack.
